case_title: CARLOS SANTIAGO HERNANDEZ VS. ARCANJEL SERVELLO TZACUN

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 09/25/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, CARLOS SANTIAGO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TZACUN, ARCANJEL SERVELLO PLAINTIFF DID NOT PRODUCE WITNESSES TO PROVE LIABILITY NOR DID HE BRING RECEIPT TO PROVE DAMAGE AMOUNT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, CARLOS SANTIAGO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CARLOS SANTIAGO HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARCANJEL SERVILLO TZACUN, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPERTER DR. JUANITA ULLOA FOR SPANISH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT SHOW THE COURT TEXT MESSAGES ON HIS PHONE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, CARLOS SANTIAGO AS TO DEFENDANT TZACUN, ARCANJEL SERVELLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE NOT INDICATED - SEE SERVICE) SERVED AUG-21-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TZACUN, ARCANJEL SERVELLO
